title: carduncellus helenioides
intro: Carduncellus helenioides, also known as the Globe Artichoke Thistle, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and support liver health. Carduncellus helenioides can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
